docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BOKOV, SERGEI ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
STIPULATION AND ORDER FOR MATTER TO BE HEARD BY A MEMBER OF THE CALIFORNIA BAR SERVING AS A TEMPORARY JUDGE SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT. FILED BY BOKOV, SERGEI CHIN, WILLIAM CHIN, YUK CHUN
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $250.00 FILED BY BOKOV, SERGEI AS TO DEFENDANT CHIN, WILLIAM CHIN, YUK CHUN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-24-2024 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $50.(WAIVED) SERVED SEP-06-2024, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CHIN, YUK CHUN
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-24-2024 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BOKOV, SERGEI IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CHIN, WILLIAM CHIN, YUK CHUN PLAINTIFF SHOWED THAT FOR THE FIRST TIME IN 11 YEARS PROPERTY PLACED IN THE COMMON AREA DISAPPEARED. AS A RESULT, HE LOST $250 IN GOODS. PLAINTIFF WAS UNABLE TO MEET HIS BURDEN UNDER THE LAW TO SHOW THAT DEFENDANT WAS RESPONSIBLE FOR THIS UNFORTUNATE LOSS. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-24-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-24-2024 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DAWN PAYNE. JUDGE PRO TEM DAWN PAYNE, CLERK JULIE RUMSEY, NOT REPORTED. (506/JR)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE: $50.00 (WAIVED) SERVED SEP-16-2024, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CHIN, WILLIAM
